guide.title: Evidence library
guide.summary: Use the evidence library to keep proof material in one governed place and reuse it across assessments, controls, findings, and other work areas.
body: An evidence record wraps a file or existing artifact with business metadata such as status, validity, review dates, and linked records.
A single evidence record can support more than one control, assessment, or finding without uploading the same file again.

concepts.label: Evidence record
concepts.summary: A governed proof item with status, dates, validation notes, and links to related records.
concepts.why_it_exists: It turns a raw uploaded file into something the compliance team can review, reuse, and track over time.
how_to_use_it: Create an evidence record from a new file or promote an existing artifact.
Link it to the controls, assessments, findings, risks, or plans that rely on it.
Keep the validation status and validity dates current.
